author: va8e
content: Plan: Convert single-crate project to Cargo workspace with two members: (1) crates/crossbridge/ for the existing CLI binary, (2) crates/crossbridge-protocol/ for the new shared protocol crate. The protocol crate will define message types (Request, Response, StatusUpdate, Error) using serde + postcard serialization, plus length-prefix framing helpers for encode/decode over streams. Will keep it no_std-compatible with alloc where possible.
